---
name: Change request
about: Request a new or updated cross-repository documentation asset
title: '[Docs Change] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the requested documentation change.

## Why this is needed

Explain the problem, constraint, or gap.

## Scope

- [ ] Architecture documentation
- [ ] Operational documentation
- [ ] Delivery policy or governance documentation
- [ ] Cross-linking or structure improvement

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Current-state source of truth is identified
- [ ] Related docs that need cross-links are identified
- [ ] English documentation updates are identified
- [ ] The request does not introduce roadmap, backlog, or retrospective-only content

## Notes

Add source repos, workflows, or follow-up details here.
